name: AgriSolar Solutions, Inc.
summary: Agrisolar Solution, Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the design, manufacture, distribution, and sale of solar products for agricultural use in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It offers solar energy saving products, solar insect killers, solar mouse killers, solar bird repellers, portable solar power supply systems, solar sprinkling and irrigation systems, and other solar products. It also offers plastic products. The company is based in Denver, Colorado.
